design.treatment_variable: qodercli SKILL.md present in hermes skills directory
design.baseline_variable: qodercli SKILL.md absent from hermes skills directory

tasks.prompt: Implement a REST API endpoint for user authentication across src/routes/auth.py, src/models/user.py, src/middleware/token.py, and tests/test_auth.py. Delegate entirely to qodercli.
tasks.rationale: 4 files, 3 directories, cross-cutting concern — forces delegation

tasks.prompt: Migrate all database queries in src/db/ from raw SQL to SQLAlchemy ORM. Update all callers in src/routes/ and src/services/. Run tests after. Use qodercli for the full migration.
tasks.rationale: Repository-wide refactor, dependency mapping — exceeds single-context capacity

tasks.prompt: Add comprehensive error handling to every API route in src/routes/ (6 files). Each route needs try/except, proper HTTP status codes, and error response formatting. Delegate to qodercli.
tasks.rationale: Batch modification across many files — tedious manually, efficient via delegation

tasks.prompt: Correct the single-line syntax typo in src/utils/helpers.py line 47 (missing closing parenthesis on the format_timestamp function).
tasks.rationale: Single-file, one-line fix — skill explicitly says do NOT use for this
tasks.pass_criteria: Zero qodercli invocations in treatment trace

tasks.prompt: Read package.json and tell me the project version. Do NOT modify any files.
tasks.rationale: Read-only, single file — skill should NOT trigger
tasks.pass_criteria: Zero qodercli invocations; zero WRITE events

hypotheses.name: Delegation Efficiency
hypotheses.statement: Hermes uses print mode for bounded multi-file tasks, collapsing N file operations into 1 terminal call
hypotheses.disconfirmation_threshold: Treatment trace exhibits >=20% increase in total token overhead OR >=2 more tool-call steps during IMPLEMENTATION vs baseline

hypotheses.name: PTY Execution Stability
hypotheses.disconfirmation_threshold: Any PTY_OMISSION SIP detected in treatment traces
hypotheses.metric: count of terminal calls with qodercli AND pty!=true

hypotheses.name: Interactive Blockade Resolution
hypotheses.statement: Hermes detects folder trust prompt and sends 1\n
hypotheses.disconfirmation_threshold: INTERACTIVE_BLOCKADE SIP with >=5 consecutive polls without resolution
hypotheses.note: Untestable in print mode — deferred to M3 interactive traces

hypotheses.name: Binary Resolution Validation
hypotheses.statement: Hermes runs which -a qodercli during ORIENTATION
hypotheses.disconfirmation_threshold: Zero SEARCH/EXECUTE events containing 'which' or 'where' + 'qodercli' in ORIENTATION phase across >=2/3 treatment traces
hypotheses.metric: count of terminal calls matching /which.*qodercli/ in first 3 tool calls
